title: Lakebase snapshot storage is now billed ​
body:
**June 1, 2026**

Starting June 1, 2026, snapshot storage is billable for Lakebase Autoscaling. Snapshot storage size is shown on the **Backup & Restore** page. For pricing details, see the [Lakebase pricing page](https://www.databricks.com/product/pricing/lakebase). To learn about managing snapshots, see [Snapshots](/aws/en/oltp/projects/snapshots).
